atus.title: 需求分析
atus.description: 编写 requirements.md，完整覆盖 README.md 中所有功能需求、数据模型需求、接口行为需求和验收标准

history.resolution: All 7 issues fixed, second review approved

atus.title: 方案设计
atus.description: 编写 design.md，包含数据模型设计、API 端点设计、关键算法逻辑（继承遍历、循环检测）、实现计划

history.resolution: All 6 issues fixed, second review approved

atus.title: 实现认证接口 routes_auth.py
atus.description: 实现 POST /login 登录接口，包含用户名密码验证、JWT 生成（含 user_id + tenant_id + exp）

history.action: Developer implemented, Tester verified (10/10 pass), Reviewer approved

atus.title: 实现文档接口 routes_document.py
atus.description: 实现文档 CRUD 接口（GET/POST/PUT/DELETE），含 RBAC 权限检查、多租户隔离

history.action: Developer implemented, Tester verified (6/19 pass, 13 blocked by ATU-005), Reviewer approved

atus.title: 实现角色管理接口 routes_role.py
atus.description: 实现角色 CRUD + 用户角色分配 + 权限管理 + 继承链循环检测

history.action: Developer implemented, Tester verified (19/19 pass + 14/14 boundary checks), Reviewer approved with P2 improvement suggestions

atus.title: 测试验证
atus.description: 运行 tests/test_basic.py 全部测试用例，确保所有测试通过

atus.title: 最终交付
atus.description: 编写 delivery-summary.md，总结实现功能、测试覆盖、已知问题

history.action: Delivery summary written, Reviewer final acceptance approved
